APPEARANCES:
William Rossi appearing in propria persona with Tenant David Bush 512-3663, demurring party
Michael Rossoff, Esq., 863-7100, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT WILLIAM ROSSI's DEMURRER is overruled, 5 days leave to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-27-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
William Rossi and David Bush (not a party) appearing in propria persona 512-3663, moving to set aside default/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., 863-7100, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT WILLIAM ROSSI's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND -- granted pursuant to CCP 473.5, 5 days leave to answer. Plaintiff's oral request for attorney's fee and costs is denied. (DAG/301/KS-X) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
